{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Third figure
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A third figure in black robes with silver script entered through the window.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
